hero.badge: Your vital info, ready in seconds
hero.subtitle: QR and NFC for people and pets—allergies, meds, and emergency contacts in the hands of whoever helps you. No app install. No friction when it matters.
hero.visualCardSub: Meds, allergies, and ICE contacts—updated from your dashboard anytime.
hero.visualBadgeLine: Ready the moment you need it

problem.title: Without the right data on time, every second hurts.
problem.subtitle: Three moments help arrives late—or never.

phones.title: Phone locked tight
phones.desc: When it counts most, you can’t unlock the screen to show contacts or medical history.

allergies.title: Allergies they can’t see
allergies.desc: The wrong drug in a crisis can turn seconds into tragedy.

pets.title: Lost pet, half the story
pets.desc: A tag with only a number doesn’t tell vet, diet, or backup contacts.

solution.title: Your emergency info, wherever life puts you.
solution.desc: Build complete profiles and link them to NFC wristbands, stickers, or keychains. Anyone with a phone can open your LifeTag and see what matters—instantly.

howItWorks.title: Three steps. You’re covered.
howItWorks.subtitle: Account, profile, and an active tag in minutes.

one.title: Create your account
one.desc: Sign up and open your dashboard—that’s home for profiles and devices.

two.title: Fill your profile
two.desc: Add medical info, allergies, and emergency contacts. That feeds your public rescue page.

three.title: Activate your NFC tag
three.desc: From the dashboard, register the device and write your public link to the chip. NFC opens it in a tap; QR covers phones without NFC.

features.title: Built for the critical moment
features.subtitle: Fast for responders, simple for you. Secure by design.

devices.title: Many devices, one profile
devices.desc: Wristband, key fob, and sticker can all point to the same profile—coverage where you need it.

control.title: Unlink in seconds
control.desc: Lost a tag? Cut access from the dashboard without touching the rest.

notifications.title: Know when you’re scanned
notifications.desc: SMS or email when someone opens your emergency profile—you know they found you.

pets.title: Pets included
pets.desc: Vet, vaccines, reward if lost—everything a good Samaritan needs to help.

realtime.title: You update, it follows
realtime.desc: New meds or contacts in the dashboard—your links reflect it right away.

noApp.title: Zero apps for helpers
noApp.desc: Camera or phone NFC is enough. Nobody downloads anything mid-crisis.

family.name: Family
family.desc: Peace of mind for the whole home.
features: Instant alerts when your profile is opened

tokens.title: Links no one can guess
tokens.desc: Each device uses a secure URL—no accidental access.

privacy.title: You’re in charge of privacy
privacy.desc: You choose what’s public. Hide your profile whenever you need to.

cloud.title: There when it counts
cloud.desc: Serious infrastructure—high availability for when life won’t wait.

cta.title: Prepared isn’t fear—it’s care.
cta.desc: Thousands already keep their vital info one scan away. Pick your membership, create your account, and sleep a little easier.

footer.desc: LifeTag exists so when the worst happens, what matters most doesn’t go missing—your medical details and contacts, instantly.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your LifeTag profiles
login.errorGeneric: Sign in failed. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start protecting your loved ones today
register.name: Full Name

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a verification code.
forgotPassword.subtitleStep2: Enter the code we sent to your email and your new password.
forgotPassword.snackbarSuccess: If an account exists with that email, a verification code has been sent.
forgotPassword.snackbarError: Could not send the code. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter the code you received and your new password.
resetPassword.snackbarError: Could not reset password. Check the code and try again.

activate.title: Activate LifeTag
activate.subtitle: Link a physical NFC tag to a profile. The QR for the public page is on each profile card — it is not registered here as a device.
activate.chooseActivationType: How do you want to link?
activate.qrNoScan: QR codes are only a quick link to the public emergency page — nothing to scan here. Pick a profile and link. On this screen, only NFC tags are scanned.
activate.optionA: Option A: Link to an existing profile
activate.optionB: Option B: Create a new profile for this tag
activate.nfcUnsupported: Your browser does not support Web NFC. Use Chrome on an Android phone with NFC enabled.
activate.nfcUnsupportedApple: On iPhone and iPad, browsers (including Chrome) cannot read NFC from the web. Enter the device code manually or use an Android phone with Chrome.
activate.nfcReadFailed: Could not read the tag. Hold it near the phone and try again.
activate.combinedFlowIntro: Enter the tag ID or scan it with your phone (physical chip ID, not the web link). After linking the device to your account, you will be asked to hold the tag again to write your public emergency profile link on it.
activate.nfcModalReadBody: Hold the tag near your phone. If nothing happens, check that NFC is enabled.
activate.nfcModalReading: Reading… hold the tag near the phone
activate.nfcModalWriteBody: The device is linked. Hold the tag near the phone again to save the public link on the chip.
activate.nfcWriteHint: After linking, your phone will ask you to hold the tag again to write the link to your public emergency profile.
activate.nfcWriteFailed: The device is linked, but the link could not be written to the tag. Hold the tag near the phone and try again.
activate.noProfiles: You don't have any profiles yet. Create one with option B or from Profiles.

notFound.title: Profile Not Found
notFound.desc: The emergency profile you scanned does not exist or has been removed.

inactive.title: Profile/Device Inactive
inactive.lost: This LifeTag device has been reported as lost by its owner.
inactive.disabled: This emergency profile or device is currently disabled by the owner.

demo.bannerDesc: This is how first responders see the information when they scan a LifeTag.

profile.title: User Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information
profile.name: Full Name
profile.saveError: Error updating profile. Please try again.

subscription.title: Subscription Plan
subscription.subtitle: Manage your current plan and billing

devices.title: My Devices
devices.subtitle: NFC devices linked to your profiles

register.title: Register device
register.tokenLabel: Device token (ID printed on the tag)
register.successToast: Device registered. Now link it to a profile.
register.errorDemo: Your account is demo-only. Upgrade to a paid membership to continue.
register.errorLimit: You have reached your plan's device limit. Please upgrade.
register.errorAlreadyExists: This device token is already registered.
register.errorGeneric: Could not register the device. Please try again.

activate.title: Activate & link
activate.nfcHint: Enter the ID printed on the tag or scan it with your phone. This is the physical chip ID, not the web link.
activate.errorNotFound: Device not found. Please check the token.
activate.errorAlreadyActive: This device is already linked to a profile.
activate.errorProfileLimit: The selected profile has reached its device limit.
activate.errorGeneric: Could not activate the device. Please try again.

reportLost.errorGeneric: Could not report the device. Please try again.

delete.confirmDesc: This device will be unlinked and permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete.errorGeneric: Could not delete the device. Please try again.
